# Results

Committed quantitative outputs — CSVs, JSONs, aggregated metric tables.

## Conventions

- Every file header includes the generating script path and the commit SHA at generation time:
  ```
  # generated by scripts/run-EXP-03.mjs at a1b2c3d on 2026-05-01
  ```
- Files are regenerated from scripts, never handwritten. When inputs change, re-run the script and overwrite.
- Scratch / exploratory outputs live in a gitignored `scratch/` directory, not here.
